CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code: -- UI is client-only; show the current map name as soon as the HUD starts. log("[MapNameDisplay] OnBeginPlay") self:UpdateMapName()

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnUpdate
CodeBlockMethod.Code: -- Poll the local player's current map every frame; the label refreshes only when it actually changes. self:UpdateMapName()

CodeBlockMethod.Name: UpdateMapName
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- Reads LocalPlayer.CurrentMapName and writes it into this entity's TextComponent when it differs from the last value. local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer if not isvalid(player) then return end
local mapName = player.CurrentMapName if mapName == nil or mapName == "" then return end if mapName == self.lastMapName then return end
self.lastMapName = mapName
local textComp = self.Entity.TextComponent if isvalid(textComp) then textComp.Text = mapName log("[MapNameDisplay] map -> " .. mapName) end
